rules_applied.outcome: Active LC exception rule for origin verification only
EU origin normalization and mixed origins handling

origin.motivation: Certificate origin lists 'European Community' and 'The United States' but invoice origin is 'France' only. No explicit invoice origin fields include 'European Community' or 'United States'. Invoice 'ORIGIN:' field states 'FRANCE'. Because of LC exception, verification is only on origin. The mismatch of origins and absence of all certificate origins in invoice results in MANUAL_REVIEW.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: LC exception active: only origin verified. Origin verification inconclusive due to lack of matching origin countries between certificate and invoice.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Ursprungslandet i certifikatet (European Community och The United States) kan inte entydigt identifieras i fakturan, där endast "France" anges som ursprung. På grund av detta krävs manuell granskning av ursprungsland.
